full_text:
Yang Xiu (Zhishu) 羊琇 (稚舒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Xiu (羊琇), styledZhishu (稚舒), was born in Ben county. Took part in conquest of Shu, helped close friend Sima Yan become Crown Prince. Yang Xiu was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Yang Xiu lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
